title: Project Braintrust — federated research

abilities.text: Each contributor's agents query THEIR own library and report back with provenance.
Findings merge into a bibliography-annotated report with inline citations.
Final report ships only after PR review — all online contributors get a vote.
Online contributors collaborate; offline ones catch up async via Issues.

flavor_text: Each librarian curates their own shelf. The braintrust is the union of what they choose to share.
